metcon.name: Part B
metcon.description:
4 RFT 15 min cap
150m Run
20 Back squats
20 Box overs 24”/20”
20 DB Snatches @ 22.5/15
80/50 kg

hypertrophy.reasoning: Legs and anterior chain are exhausted; posterior chain accessory work enhances recovery and addresses muscular imbalances.
suggested_exercises: Barbell or dumbbell bent-over flyes: 3 x 12–15
Barbell curls or dumbbell curls: 3 x 8–10

raw_text:
Warm up | 100m run
10 air squats
10 scap push-ups
10 band pull-aparts
5 inchworms
5 burpees or up-downs
30 sec PVC shoulder  opener
3 clean pulls
3 power cleans
3 strict press
3 push press
3 push jerk
3 front squat
5 beat swings
5 bigger beat swings
5 pull ups / 5 chest to bad
2-3 muscle ups
Part A | AMRAP 18 min
300m Run
5 Power clean ea
5 Push jerk ea
5 Bar muscle ups ea
Rest 2 mins
80/50
Part B | 4 RFT 15 min cap
150m Run
20 Back squats
20 Box overs 24”/20”
20 DB Snatches @ 22.5/15
80/50 kg
siri_text: Saturday's workout. Metcon: Part B. Rounds for Time: 150m Run, 20 Back squats, 20 Box overs 24”/20”, 20 DB Snatches @ 22.5/15, 80/50 kg. For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, shoulders (rear/lateral).
